texto: I'm interested not just in projects that I'll be starring in, but producing film and TV that's really quality and great for adults; and when I say 'great for adults,' it doesn't mean without humor, because I'm also interested in doing comedy.
explicacao: Citação de Lance Reddick sobre temas ligados a humor. “I'm interested not just in projects that I'll be starring in, but producing film and TV that's re…” articula humor, great, quality em registro de humor, com relevância para contextos como quality e comedy.

frase_original: I'm interested not just in projects that I'll be starring in, but producing film and TV that's really quality and great for adults; and when I say 'great for adults,' it doesn't mean without humor, because I'm also interested in doing comedy.
